title: thecacoris micrantha
intro: Thecacoris micrantha, also known as the African bush mango, is a plant species native to West Africa, characterized by its small, greenish-yellow fruit and large, oval-shaped leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, derived from its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Thecacoris micrantha include treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as supporting digestive health and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
